pr.title: [WIP] Add desync forensics viewer with field-level diff
pr.body:
- [x] Audit current snapshot/replay/desync formats, hash-chain path, arena component schema, Replay Studio model, and test fixtures
- [x] Run baseline configure/build/tests to confirm clean starting state
- [ ] Add a schema-aware desync forensics model/engine in library code (frame parsing, field-level diff, first-divergence detection, report generation)
- [ ] Add robust parsing/error handling for malformed dumps and version mismatches
- [ ] Add focused unit tests for identical cases, field diffs, frame divergence, entity/component add/remove, mismatch handling, malformed input, and report content
- [ ] Integrate a minimal SDL forensics viewer mode in arena_view with side-by-side local/remote state, changed-only toggle, entity/component filtering, jump-to-first-divergence, and report export
- [ ] Add replay linkage in forensics mode (optional replay load and jump/context display)
- [ ] Update docs with a reproducible desync forensics demo flow
- [ ] Build and run targeted tests for changed areas
- [ ] Run full non-soak test suite and final validation (including parallel_validation)
pr.author: Copilot
